coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. Your aerobic system is thanking you right now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training your body to burn fat efficiently.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. Trust it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This feels like cheating. It's not. It's science.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 105% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1 of 1. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First block: find your rhythm. Don't go too hard too early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/3. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 0s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 37 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-100 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.
